calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Deny And Dismiss Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Murray of Law Offices of Murray & Associates telephone number 415-673-0555 for Plaintiff.
Erin Gallagher of Archer Norris telephone number 925-930-6600 for Oregon Mutual Insurance Company Respondent/Cross-Complainant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, RESPONDENT OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Deny And Dismiss Petition To Compel Arbitration is taken under submission. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Deny And Dismiss Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Continued To Oct-21-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDREW J. KING OF ARCHER NORRIS, TEL. NO. (925)930-6600 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANT MAZAFFARI, MICHAEL DBA MAZAFFARI CULINARY SERVICES' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. As an initial matter, although the Demurrer was untimely, Defendant has shown no prejudice due to the delay, and the Court will consider the Demurrer on its merits. The Demurrer is overruled as to causes of action 1, 2, and 3. First, none of these causes of action fall within the scope of Civil Code section 2860's arbitration provision, because they all exclusively seek a determination of Defendant's duty to defend and/or to reimburse Plaintiff's counsel in the underlying Chelemedos litigation. Second, they all allege sufficient facts to state a claim. The Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action. The cause of action seeks a declaration on an issue that must be determined by arbitration pursuant to Civil Code section 2860(c). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2014 Continued To Sep-26-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
CROSS DEFENDANT MAZAFFARI, MICHAEL DBA MAZAFFARI CULINARY SERVICES' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is continued on the Court's motion to September 26, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/eg
